title: Populate sessionSchemaRefs / deploymentSchemaRefs on all 7 commissioned harnesses
description: After harness-schemas v0.2.0 lands (sessionSchemaRefs + deploymentSchemaRefs added to HarnessAspectDoc), backfill the new fields on every commissioned harness organism. Mapping confirmed with operator: hulk → claude-session-schemas v0.1.0, codex → codex-session-schemas v0.2.0 (also consider sibling codex-session-store-schemas v0.1.0), pi → pi-session-schemas v0.1.0, apple-pi → pi-session-schemas v0.1.0 (same shape as pi, engine binding to FoundationModels is the delta), digikoma → digikoma-deployment-schemas v0.2.0 (deployment, not session), gemini → empty until gemini-session-schemas v0.1.0 is authored, clide → empty until decision lands. Bump aspects.harness.doc.schemaVersion to 0.2.0 in each. Each harness organism is at private/universal/substrate/harnesses/<slug>/private/universal/identity/<slug>@rismay.substrate.organism.json. Hulk, gemini, and codex are in submodules; pi is a submodule too. digikoma + clide + apple-pi tracked in mono.
